plugins.prepareCmd: VERSION=${nextRelease.version} jq --arg v "$VERSION" '.version=$v' server.json > server.tmp && mv server.tmp server.json

plugins.publishCmd: curl -L https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/registry/releases/latest/download/mcp-publisher_$(uname -s | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')_$(uname -m | sed 's/x86_64/amd64/;s/aarch64/arm64/').tar.gz | tar xz mcp-publisher && ./mcp-publisher login github-oidc && ./mcp-publisher publish
